name: Plan → Code → Test → Review
description: Full development workflow with planning, implementation, testing, and review stages

stages.name: Plan
stages.description: Analyze the task and create an implementation plan
stages.systemPromptAppend: You are in the PLANNING stage. Analyze the task, explore the codebase, and create a detailed implementation plan. Do NOT make any code changes yet. When your plan is complete, summarize it and say "Planning complete."

stages.name: Code
stages.systemPromptAppend: You are in the CODING stage. Implement the plan from the previous stage. Follow the project's coding conventions. Write clean, tested code. When implementation is done, say "Implementation complete."

stages.name: Test
stages.systemPromptAppend: You are in the TESTING stage. Run the test suite and fix any failures. Ensure adequate test coverage for your changes. When all tests pass, say "Testing complete."

stages.name: Review
stages.systemPromptAppend:
You are in the REVIEW stage. Review all changes you made. Check for:
- Code quality and style consistency
- Missing error handling
- Security issues
- Missing tests
Fix any issues found. When satisfied, say "Review complete."
